outlook_cert_pem.label: Azure app certificate PEM contents (cert + private key; alternative to client secret)

outlook_cert_password.label: Passphrase for the certificate PEM (leave empty if unencrypted)

allowed_senders.label: Allowed senders (comma-separated; supports glob wildcards e.g. *@mycompany.com; empty blocks all)

poll_top.label: Delta page size per poll (<=50; the poll pages to the end, so this caps per-page size, not the total)

restrict_read_to_allowed_senders.label: Prevent MCP tool from reading messages from untrusted senders
restrict_read_to_allowed_senders.description: When enabled (recommended), the read tools (outlook_get_message / outlook_get_attachment) only surface mail that passes the same gate as the publisher: sender on allowed_senders AND a DMARC pass (fail-closed). Warning: disabling may lead to security risk! (the agent could read any message in the mailbox, including spoofed / non-allow-listed / DMARC-failed mail)

activation_modes.label: Activation modes (comma-separated: direct,mention)
activation_modes.description: When the agent may act on inbound mail. 'direct' = the mailbox (or an alias) is the sole recipient; 'mention' = the summon token appears in the subject or body preview. Empty disables both (the agent never activates).

summon_token.label: Summon token
summon_token.description: Token that triggers 'mention' activation when it appears (case-insensitive) in the subject or body preview. Default '@agento'.

direct_requires_sole_recipient.label: Direct activation requires sole recipient
direct_requires_sole_recipient.description: When on (default), 'direct' activation fires only if the mailbox (or an alias) is the sole recipient across To+Cc. When off, any direct address activates.

mailbox_aliases.label: Mailbox aliases (comma-separated)
mailbox_aliases.description: Extra addresses that count as this mailbox for direct activation (e.g. support@ aliased to the monitored UPN). Compared against To+Cc alongside the primary mailbox UPN.

allow_bot_collaboration.label: Allow bot collaboration
allow_bot_collaboration.description: When off (default), inbound mail from a fleet agent mailbox is suppressed (no job) to break bot-to-bot loops. The fleet is auto-derived from the agent_views (the mailbox of every other outlook-enabled view). Turn on only to let agents collaborate on the same thread.

reply_policy.label: Reply-all whitelist policy
reply_policy.description: How outlook_reply handles a reply-all recipient that is NOT in core/email_whitelist. 'remove' (default) drops the blocked recipient(s) and sends to the rest; 'block' blocks the entire reply if any recipient is not whitelisted. Either way, mail only ever reaches whitelisted addresses. Applies to outlook_reply only (outlook_send_mail always blocks the whole send).

options.label: Remove non-whitelisted recipients from the reply (default)
Block the entire reply if any recipient is not whitelisted
